findings.evidence: Existing API: `LinearSystemAddition.lean:48` `lemma add_mem_completeLinearSystem`, `:55`/`:61` left/right forms, `:68` `lemma nonempty_completeLinearSystem_add`; existing self membership: `LinearSystem.lean:72` `lemma self_mem_completeLinearSystem`.
findings.fix: Use `S.add_mem_completeLinearSystem`, `S.add_mem_completeLinearSystem_left/right`, and `S.nonempty_completeLinearSystem_add` directly, or keep only the genuinely order-specific wrappers.
findings.issue: The effective-addition block (`add_effective_mem_completeLinearSystem`, `effective_add_mem_completeLinearSystem`, both `MapsTo` forms, and both nonempty forms) duplicates the existing addition API with `S.self_mem_completeLinearSystem hA`.

findings.evidence: Existing constructors/effectivity lemmas: `WeilDivisor.lean:134` `isEffective_ofPoint`, `FiniteSum.lean:205` `isEffective_ofFinsupp`, `FiniteSum.lean:477` `isEffective_ofFinsetWithMultiplicity`, `FiniteSum.lean:682` `isEffective_ofFinset`; the new proofs are exactly `S.add_effective_mem_completeLinearSystem ... (isEffective_...)` or `S.nonempty_completeLinearSystem_add_effective (isEffective_...)`.
findings.fix: Remove these consumer forms and call the general theorem with the existing `isEffective_ofPoint`, `isEffective_ofFinsupp`, `isEffective_ofFinsetWithMultiplicity`, and `isEffective_ofFinset` lemmas.
findings.issue: The point and finite effective translate lemmas at lines 117, 123, 132, 139, 146, 154, 160, and 167 are constructor-specific restatements of the general effective-add/nonempty lemmas.

summary: The order-translation lemmas are new enough, but the PR also adds parallel convenience API that is just existing complete-linear-system addition specialized through existing effectivity constructors.
